expand_hwnds.description: HWNDs to expand UI trees for. Focused window is auto-expanded — list ADDITIONAL ones only.

done_so_far.description: Factual progress summary from VERIFIED STATE. OK=success, ELEMENT_CHANGED=progress, NOT_FOUND=gone. Min 50 words.

next_step.description: Specific next action(s). Name exact elements, text, keys. If stuck, suggest different approach. Min 50 words.
